meta.title: Research Integrity Provenance and Evidence Ontology

classes.label: Author
classes.comment: A ripe:Author is a prov:Person and foaf:Person representing a person primarily responsible for a resource represented in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. Such resources may include works and other pieces of information, such as peer comments. The author of a journal article or the person named as responsible for a peer comment are examples of ripe:Author.

classes.label: AutomatedAgent
classes.comment: A ripe:AutomatedAgent is a prov:SoftwareAgent representing a software agent that participates in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment by gathering evidence, deriving assessment-relevant information, or producing initial outcomes. A software that can perform ripe:EvidenceAggregation and produce ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis instances without human intervention is modeled as a ripe:AutomatedAgent.

classes.label: CorrectionNotice
classes.comment: A ripe:CorrectionNotice is a fabio:Correction and ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence representing a formal correction notice about a ripe:Work and used as evidence in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. For example, an erratum correcting a published article is a ripe:CorrectionNotice.

classes.label: EvidenceAggregation
classes.comment: A ripe:EvidenceAggregation is a prov:Activity representing the aggregation of evidence and source records used in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. It provides provenance for the evidence collected for one ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. Retrieval of registry records and publication notices for one assessed work is one such activity.

classes.label: ExpressionOfConcern
classes.comment: A ripe:ExpressionOfConcern is a fabio:Comment and ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence representing a formal journal or publisher notice that raises concerns about a ripe:Work and is used as evidence in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. For example, a publisher notice questioning the reliability of a trial report is an expression of concern.

classes.label: HumanReviewer
classes.comment: A ripe:HumanReviewer is a prov:Person and foaf:Person representing a human agent who participates in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment by evaluating evidence and recording ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis instances. A systematic reviewer investigating research integrity of a study is a ripe:HumanReviewer.

classes.label: IntegrityAssessmentEvidence
classes.comment: A ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence is a tido:Evidence item used to support, challenge, or contextualise a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. Publication metadata, registry evidence, study-design evidence, publication notices, and peer comments used in an integrity assessment are examples of ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence.

classes.label: IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis
classes.comment: A ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis is a tido:Hypothesis that records an automated or human-reviewed answer to a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentQuestion. For example, a reviewer or automated agent may produce a hypothesis that a study has no concerns, some concerns, or serious concerns.

classes.label: IntegrityAssessmentQuestion
classes.comment: A ripe:IntegrityAssessmentQuestion is a tido:RQ and prov:Entity representing one specific integrity-related question investigated within a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. It is answered by one or more ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis instances via tido:answers. An example of a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentQuestion is a question asking whether a ripe:Work has an associated retraction.

classes.label: OverallIntegrityAssessmentQuestion
classes.comment: A ripe:OverallIntegrityAssessmentQuestion is a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentQuestion representing the overall integrity question investigated for a ripe:Work within a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. It is answered by one or more ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis instances that synthesise the component integrity assessment questions and their corresponding hypotheses.

classes.label: PeerComment
classes.comment: A ripe:PeerComment is a fabio:Comment and ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence representing a post-publication comment from the research community about a ripe:Work and used as evidence in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. For example, a PubPeer comment discussing methodological concerns is a ripe:PeerComment.

classes.label: PublicationDetails
classes.comment: A ripe:PublicationDetails is a fabio:BibliographicMetadata and ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence representing bibliographic metadata describing a ripe:Work. It may record values such as title, publication venue, publisher, identifiers, and publication date. A record containing title, journal, publisher, and publication date for a trial article is one such instance.

classes.label: RegistryEvidence
classes.comment: A ripe:RegistryEvidence is a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence representing information recorded in a trial registry about a ripe:Work. It may record values such as the registry identifier, registration date, registry name, registry link, and the associated registration assessment rationale. A ClinicalTrials.gov or WHO ICTRP entry associated with the assessed work is one such instance.

classes.label: ResearchIntegrityAssessment
classes.comment: A ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment represents one integrity assessment of a ripe:Work. It brings together the assessed work, the ripe:IntegrityAssessmentQuestion instances investigated for that work, the ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis instances answering those questions, the ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence instances supporting them, and the activities that generated or reviewed those outcomes. An assessment of a single published clinical trial report is one such instance.

classes.label: RetractionNotice
classes.comment: A ripe:RetractionNotice is a fabio:RetractionNotice and ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence representing a formal retraction notice used as evidence in a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. For example, a journal-issued retraction notice for a trial article is a ripe:RetractionNotice.

classes.label: StudyDesignEvidence
classes.comment: A ripe:StudyDesignEvidence is a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence representing information about the design and timeline of a study relevant to a ripe:Work. It may record values such as recruitment start, recruitment end, and study end dates, together with rationales supporting those assigned values. A record describing the recruitment and completion timeline of a clinical study is one such instance.

classes.label: Work
classes.comment: A ripe:Work is a fabio:Work and prov:Entity representing a publication that is directly assessed or otherwise referred to within a ripe:ResearchIntegrityAssessment. It includes the assessed work itself and other related publications, such as cited works or original articles associated with publication notices. For example, a trial article under review is a ripe:Work.

objectProperties.label: assesses
objectProperties.comment: Links a research integrity assessment to the work being assessed.

objectProperties.label: concerns
objectProperties.comment: Links evidence to the work or author that the evidence concerns.

datatypeProperties.label: is prospective
datatypeProperties.comment: Records whether a ripe:RegistryEvidence instance supports the judgement that the study was prospectively registered. For example, a value of true indicates that registration was assessed as preceding the relevant study start point.

datatypeProperties.label: rationale
datatypeProperties.comment: Records a textual justification attached to a tido:PieceOfInformation, such as an extracted value or an assessment conclusion. For example, it may store a reviewer note defending a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis.

datatypeProperties.label: recruitment end date
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the date value assigned as the participant recruitment end in a ripe:StudyDesignEvidence instance. For example, it may capture an enrolment end date reported in the article text.

datatypeProperties.label: recruitment end date extraction rationale
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the textual justification for assigning a value to ripe:recruitmentEndDate in a ripe:StudyDesignEvidence instance. For example, the agent responsible for gathering the ripe:recruitmentEndDate may state that the end of enrolment was inferred from the methods described in the study protocol.

datatypeProperties.label: recruitment start date
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the date value assigned as the participant recruitment start in a ripe:StudyDesignEvidence instance. For example, it may capture a month-year or date string when the first participant was enrolled for a study.

datatypeProperties.label: recruitment start date extraction rationale
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the textual justification for assigning a value to ripe:recruitmentStartDate in a ripe:StudyDesignEvidence instance. For example, it may note that a sentence describing when enrolment began was interpreted as the recruitment start date by the agent responsible.

datatypeProperties.label: registration assessment rationale
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the textual justification for the registration-status assessment represented by a ripe:RegistryEvidence instance. For example, it may explain that the registry submission date was compared with the recruitment start date.

datatypeProperties.label: registration date
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the registration date value associated with a ripe:RegistryEvidence instance. For example, it may store the submission date shown in a ClinicalTrials.gov record.

datatypeProperties.label: registration identifier
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the registry identifier associated with a ripe:RegistryEvidence instance. For example, this may be an NCT or ISRCTN number.

datatypeProperties.label: registration link
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the URI of the registry record represented by a ripe:RegistryEvidence instance. For example, it may point to a ClinicalTrials.gov or WHO ICTRP record page.

datatypeProperties.label: registry name
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the name of the trial registry represented by a ripe:RegistryEvidence instance. For example, values may include ClinicalTrials.gov, ISRCTN, or WHO ICTRP.

datatypeProperties.label: result outcome
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the lexical outcome assigned to a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentHypothesis in answer to a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentQuestion. For example, the agents may assign no-concerns, some-concerns, or serious-concerns in response to a question about the study's integrity.

datatypeProperties.label: retraction watch record identifier
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the source identifier assigned by the Retraction Watch database to a ripe:IntegrityAssessmentEvidence item when such an identifier is available. In the RIPE-KG, this is used for retraction notices, expressions of concern, and correction notices sourced from Retraction Watch.

datatypeProperties.label: study end date
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the date value assigned as the study end in a ripe:StudyDesignEvidence instance. For example, it may capture a reported study completion or final follow-up date.

datatypeProperties.label: study end date extraction rationale
datatypeProperties.comment: Records the textual justification for assigning a value to ripe:studyEndDate in a ripe:StudyDesignEvidence instance. For example, it may explain why a final follow-up date was treated as the study end date.
